hooks.command: if command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1; then python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/dispatcher.py" SessionStart; else python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/dispatcher.py" SessionStart; fi
if command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1; then python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/dispatcher.py" PreToolUse; else python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/dispatcher.py" PreToolUse; fi
if command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1; then python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/dispatcher.py" PostToolUse; else python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/dispatcher.py" PostToolUse; fi
if command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1; then python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/dispatcher.py" Stop; else python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/dispatcher.py" Stop; fi
if command -v python >/dev/null 2>&1; then python "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/dispatcher.py" SessionEnd; else python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/scripts/dispatcher.py" SessionEnd; fi
